title: tragacantha cruckshanksii
intro: Tragacantha cruckshanksii, also known as the broom grass or jointed broom grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
